title: Bump This
description: A Mod Made For All Those Who Chose to Pointlessly Bump Their Projects on The Fabric Discord.
body:
Punishes the player when ever they say bump in various creative ways.   
+ What does your project add?   
    + Currently, my project adds a feature that bumps the player into the air whenever they put the word "bump" in chat.   
+ What features does it have?   
    + /\   
+ Why would a user want to download it?   
  + Don't. this project is a joke from this thread on the fabric discord:
  + [Bump](https://discord.com/channels/507304429255393322/1253212876181602434)
